column1: (1) CRM Model Capital is calculated once per week.
(2) CRM Model RWA is calculated using the greater of the 12 week mean and period end CRM Model Capital (see Table 24.1 below), multiplied by 12.5.
(3) The CRM Floor is based on the fair value of net long positions (inclusive of netting).
(4) Final CRM RWA = Greater of (2) CRM-Model RWA and (3) 8% CRM Floor.
Immaterial differences in calculations above may exist due to rounding.
